[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000010100 2
1 0000000100 1
2 0101100000 3
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0101100000 3

34 43 1100000010 3

56 65 0000010100 2 match 0
67 76 0000000100 1 match 1
70 07 0101100000 3 match 2 7

13 31 0100000000 1

71 17 0100000000 1

36 63 0000000100 1 match 1

61 16 0000011000 2
72 27 0001100000 2
